document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Mount Pleasant Project in North America dated August 2006.pdf
document.description: An NI 43-101 compliant technical report assessing the potential of the Mount Pleasant property, with a focus on the Fire Tower Zone in southwestern New Brunswick, and providing a Mineral Resource estimate.
